title: dactylorhiza majalis subsp. occidentalis
intro: Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. occidentalis, also known as the Western Marsh Orchid, is a type of orchid native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. occidentalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
